reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar combustible hoy Jueves 17.11 al ACA de A. Beiro, estuve 10 mins esperando y no me atendió nadie (el playero cargando en la isla de al lado), termina de atender al de al lado, me pasó por al lado(no me dijo nada) y se fue a meter a la oficina. Un desastre

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up my car today, Thursday, November 17th, at the ACA station on A. Beiro. I waited 10 minutes and no one helped me (the attendant was filling up at the next pump). He finished helping the other driver, walked past me (without saying a word), and went into the office. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtbjhuVW1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy 26 de octubre de 2022, siendo aproximadamente las 17,55 horas, me acerque con una rueda en llantas, le pedí al encargado si me ayudaba con darle aire a la rueda y me dijo que no lo tenían conectado, le pedí si me ayudaba con el cambio de rueda y me manifestó que no tenía personal, que buscará otra estación de servicio. Siempre es mala la atención, jamas cumplen con el ciclo de servicios que  deben ofrecer al cliente, pero hoy se
exedieron.

(Translated by Google)
Today, October 26, 2022, at approximately 5:55 PM, I approached the gas station with a flat tire. I asked the attendant if he could help me inflate it, and he said they didn't have the air pump connected. I asked if he could help me change the tire, and he told me they didn't have the staff and that I should look for another gas station. The service is always bad; they never fulfill the service cycle they're supposed to offer customers, but today they went too far.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtLU1tbVVnEAE
